name: Mr Ahmed K.
title: Cambridge Physics & Mathematics
bio: Specialist in mechanics, waves, and advanced algebra. Focused on exam technique and structured problem-solving. Strong track record with O-Level Paper 4 and ATP Physics.

name: Ms Sarah M.
title: Cambridge English Language & Literature
bio: Expert in directed writing, essay composition, and reading comprehension. Trained on EduMeUp's 10-course English framework. Particular strength in Band 1 essay development and directed writing formats.

name: Mr Tariq N.
title: Cambridge Chemistry & Biology
bio: Strong command of organic chemistry, cell biology, and genetics. Connects syllabus content to ATP-level application. Experienced with students transitioning from Pre-O-Level to full O-Level programmes.

name: Ms Aisha R.
title: Cambridge Mathematics & Economics
bio: Highly rated for mathematical reasoning and microeconomics. Her systematic approach to past paper technique has helped students move from C grades to A*/A at O-Level and A-Level consistently.

name: Mr Daniel C.
title: A-Level Physics & Chemistry Specialist
bio: Specialist in A-Level transition — bridging the conceptual gap between O-Level and A-Level in Physics and Chemistry. Experienced with Cambridge AS & A Level syllabi across multiple examination series.

name: Ms Fatima Z.
title: Cambridge Urdu & Islamiyat
bio: Focused on Cambridge O-Level Urdu composition and Islamiyat essay technique. Strong command of the Cambridge marking scheme and examiner expectations for both subjects across recent papers.

name: Mr James W.
title: Cambridge Business & Economics
bio: Skilled at making Business and Economics concepts tangible through real-world application. Particular strength in case study question technique and command word recognition for both O and A Level.

name: Ms Hana L.
title: Lower Secondary English & Mathematics
bio: Specialist in building foundational skills for younger learners transitioning toward O-Level readiness. Strong alignment with EduMeUp's Vocab Gr 5–7, RC68, and Lower Secondary Mathematics frameworks.
